title: How to make a strong password
description: Learn a simple method to create secure passwords that are easy to remember but hard for hackers to guess.

steps.title: Think of four random words
steps.body: Choose four common words that don't belong together (like 'paper-basket-coffee-cloud'). This is called a passphrase.

steps.title: Add numbers or symbols
steps.body: Separate the words using dashes, dots, or add a number at the end (like 'paper-basket-coffee-cloud-26').

steps.title: Avoid personal details
steps.body: Never use your name, birthday, pet's name, or home address in your password.

steps.title: Use a unique password for every account
steps.body: If one website gets hacked, your other accounts will stay safe if they all have different passwords.

glossary.definition: A password made of several random words combined together, which is highly secure and easy to remember.
A safe digital notebook or app that remembers all of your different passwords for you.
